narrative: I noticed a medium-severity Neo4j authentication error preventing memory updates in my knowledge graph. My agents desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, and reasoning_methods lack versioned prompts, risking inconsistent behavior. This requires immediate attention to maintain agent reliability within my memory architecture. My ChromaDB memory remains intact but the knowledge graph disruption affects cross-session fact extraction. I must prioritize fixing the Neo4j authentication and versioning all agents.
